available - Variable in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
Remaining headroom: maxCapacity - gapSize - current (may be negative).
availableCapacity(int, String) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Computes the remaining headroom for a park on a given date: the park's max_capacity minus its gap_size minus the total party size of all PENDING/CONFIRMED reservations for that park and date.
avgPerDay - Variable in class common.dto.CancellationsReportDTO
Average cancellations+no-shows per calendar day of the inclusive range.
avgStayMinutes - Variable in class common.dto.VisitsReportRow
Average stay in minutes over the closed visits (0 if none closed).

client.app - package client.app
Client-side application navigation and session support for the GoNature desktop client.
client.boundary - package client.boundary
JavaFX client application entry points and top-level boundary classes.
client.net - package client.net
Client networking infrastructure for communicating with the GoNature server over TCP/IP.
client.service - package client.service
Client services that wrap network calls and expose higher-level operations to the UI.
client.view - package client.view
JavaFX controllers and reusable widgets for the GoNature user interface.
clientByIp - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Stores the client by ip value used by this component.
ClientConnection - Class in client.net
Persistent TCP connection to the GoNature server with async request/response correlation and unsolicited-event support.
ClientConnection(String, int) - Constructor for class client.net.ClientConnection
Creates a new client connection instance.
ClientConnection.ConnectionClosedException - Exception Class in client.net
Surfaces a connection drop to any thread waiting in ClientConnection.sendRequest(ClientRequest) as a typed IOException so callers can distinguish it from generic stream failures.
ClientRequest - Class in common.dto
Represents a request sent from the client to the server.
ClientRequest(RequestType) - Constructor for class common.dto.ClientRequest
Creates a new request with the given type.
ClientRow(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class server.boundary.ServerGUI.ClientRow
 
clients - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Stores the clients value used by this component.
ClientSession - Class in server.net
Per-connection server-side state for one client.
ClientSession(Socket, ObjectInputStream, ObjectOutputStream) - Constructor for class server.net.ClientSession
Wraps an already-connected socket and its already-constructed object streams.
close() - Method in class client.net.ClientConnection
Closes the connection and shuts the reader thread down cleanly.
close() - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Closes the streams and the socket.
closeConnection() - Method in class client.app.Session
Performs the close connection operation.
closeVisit(int) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO

EventBus - Class in client.net
Process-wide bus that dispatches ServerEvents pushed from the server to interested local subscribers on the JavaFX Application thread.
EventBus() - Constructor for class client.net.EventBus
Creates a new event bus instance.
EventBus.Subscription - Class in client.net
Handle returned by EventBus.subscribe(common.dto.SubscriptionKey, java.util.function.Consumer<common.dto.ServerEvent>) so callers can detach themselves without holding references to the underlying callback or key.
EventOp - Enum Class in common.dto
Kind of change carried by a ServerEvent on the realtime push channel.

exitTab - Variable in class client.view.GateController
 
exitVisit(Integer, Long) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Records a visitor's exit, closing their open visit (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
exitVisitByTicket(int) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Records a casual walk-in's exit by its ticket number (PARK_EMPLOYEE only).
exitVisitorField - Variable in class client.view.GateController
 
expireOverdueOffers() - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Sweeps every grab offer whose deadline has passed: the offeree forfeited, so each lapsed entry is removed, its now-orphaned WAITING reservation is CANCELLED (via ReservationDAO.updateStatus(int, common.dto.ReservationStatus), which also stamps status_changed_at), and the grab is advanced to the next eligible waiting party for that same park/date (via ReservationController.offerGrabToNext(int, java.lang.String)).
expireOverdueOffers(boolean) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Force-aware variant of ReservationController.expireOverdueOffers().
expireUnconfirmedReservations() - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Auto-cancels every PENDING reservation that was reminded to confirm but did not do so within SchedulerConfig.getConfirmTimeoutMinutes() minutes.
expireUnconfirmedReservations(boolean) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Force-aware variant of ReservationController.expireUnconfirmedReservations().
expiry - Variable in class client.view.WaitlistController.TickTarget
 

F

FAMILY - Enum constant in enum class common.dto.VisitType
A family-sized booking under one visitor.
familySpinner - Variable in class client.view.SubscriberRegisterController
 
field - Variable in class common.dto.ParameterChangeRequestDTO
Which park parameter the change targets.
fieldCombo - Variable in class client.view.ParkParamsController
 
fieldLabel(String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
 
fieldLabelStyle() - Method in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Performs the field label style operation.
findActiveByVisitor(long) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Lists a visitor's active waiting-list entries — those whose reservation is still WAITING — in FIFO (queue) order.
findByConfirmationCode(int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Looks up a single reservation by its booking confirmation code — the lookup the gate performs at entry, where the visitor presents the code printed on their booking.
findById(int) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Looks up a single visit by its primary key — used to echo the row just created back to the gate (the casual path has neither a confirmation code nor, necessarily, a visitor id to look it up by).
findByVisitor(long) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Lists every reservation owned by a visitor, most recent visit first.
findConfirmTimeoutCandidates(int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Finds the PENDING reservations whose confirmation window has lapsed: still PENDING, already reminded (reminder_sent_at IS NOT NULL), and reminded more than timeoutMinutes ago.
findConfirmTimeoutCandidates(int, boolean) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Force-aware variant of ReservationDAO.findConfirmTimeoutCandidates(int).
findExpiredOffers() - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Lists every entry whose active offer has lapsed — those with an offer set (grab_offered_at IS NOT NULL) whose grab_expires_at is now in the past, ordered FIFO.
findExpiredOffers(boolean) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Force-aware variant of WaitlistDAO.findExpiredOffers().
findNextEligible(int, String, int) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Finds the FIFO-first queue entry eligible to be offered a freed slot: the earliest-queued entry whose reservation is still WAITING for the given park and date, that does not already hold an offer, and whose party fits the freed capacity ("must-fit").
findNoShowCandidates() - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Finds the reservations that the no-show sweep should mark ReservationStatus.NO_SHOW: those still CONFIRMED whose visit_date is strictly before today (a same-day booking can still arrive) and for which no visit row was ever recorded — i.e.
findNoShowCandidates(boolean) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Force-aware variant of ReservationDAO.findNoShowCandidates().
findOpenByConfirmation(int) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Finds the open visit (not yet exited) reached by a reservation's confirmation code, joining reservation to resolve the code.
findOpenByReservation(int) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Finds the open visit for a specific reservation.
findOpenByVisitor(long) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Finds the open visit (not yet exited) for a given visitor.
findReminderCandidates(int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Finds the PENDING reservations due a confirmation reminder: those whose visit (combining visit_date with visit_time, or midnight when the time is null) falls between now and leadHours from now, and that have not already been reminded (reminder_sent_at IS NULL).
findReminderCandidates(int, boolean) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Force-aware variant of ReservationDAO.findReminderCandidates(int).
findStaffByCredentials(String, String) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Looks up a staff user by username and password.
findUserById(long) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Looks up a staff user by their primary key.
findVisitorById(long) - Method in class server.dao.AuthDAO
Looks up a visitor by their national ID (login-by-ID).

formatVisitTime() - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Converts the compact 12-hour picker (hour 1–12, minute, AM/PM) into the 24-hour HH:mm:ss string the server/DB expect for visit_time — byte-identical to what the old picker sent.
formatVisitTime() - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController.EditFlow
Converts the 12-hour dropdowns (Hour 1–12, Minute, AM/PM) into the 24-hour HH:mm:ss string the server expects — byte-identical to the Book Visit form: 12 AM → 00, 12 PM → 12, any other PM hour + 12.

insert(ReservationDTO) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Inserts a new reservation, letting the database assign the auto-increment id.
insert(Long, Integer, String, String) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Inserts a new notification, letting the database assign the auto-increment id and stamp created_at.
insertEntry(int) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Inserts a new queue entry for a WAITING reservation, letting the database stamp queued_at = NOW() and leaving the offer columns (grab_offered_at/grab_expires_at) NULL until a slot is offered via WaitlistDAO.markOffered(int, java.lang.String).
insertRequest(int, int, ParamField, int, int) - Method in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Inserts a new change request in the PENDING state, stamping created_at with the current time.
insertVisit(Integer, int, Long, int, VisitType, Integer) - Method in class server.dao.VisitDAO
Records a new (open) visit, letting the database stamp entered_at and leaving exited_at NULL.

Basic client-side email check (non-blank, contains an '@' and a '.') mirroring the server's isValidEmail.
isValidEmail(String) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Basic server-side email sanity check for the booking contact: non-blank and containing both an '@' and a '.'.
isValidPhone(String) - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Basic client-side phone check (at least ten digits, ignoring formatting) mirroring the server's isValidPhone.
isValidPhone(String) - Method in class server.control.ReservationController
Basic server-side phone check for the booking contact: it must carry at least ten digits (a national mobile number's worth), ignoring any formatting such as dashes, spaces, parentheses or a leading '+'.

Identifier of the park's manager (user.id), or null if none.
map - Variable in class server.subscription.SubscriptionRegistry
Stores the map value used by this component.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Maps the current row of a ResultSet (selected via NotificationDAO.SELECT_BASE) to a NotificationDTO, resolving the recipient's contact into the simulated target.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO
Maps the current ResultSet row to a ParameterChangeRequestDTO.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.ParkDAO
Maps the current ResultSet row to a ParkDTO.
map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO

map(ResultSet) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Maps the current row of a ResultSet (selected via WaitlistDAO.SELECT_BASE) to a WaitlistEntryDTO.
markOffered(int, String) - Method in class server.dao.WaitlistDAO
Marks an entry as offered the freed slot: stamps grab_offered_at = NOW() and sets grab_expires_at to the supplied deadline (the caller computes it, typically one hour out).
markReminderSent(int) - Method in class server.dao.ReservationDAO
Stamps reminder_sent_at = NOW() on a reservation, marking that its confirmation reminder has gone out so ReservationDAO.findReminderCandidates(int) will skip it on the next poll.
markSent(int) - Method in class server.dao.NotificationDAO
Marks a notification as delivered by stamping sent_at = NOW().

Upper bound for the family-size spinner; the DB default is 1.
MAX_GROUP_SIZE - Static variable in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Maximum party size for a guide-led group visit (mirrored on the server).
maxCapacity - Variable in class common.dto.OccupancyDTO
The park's maximum physical capacity.
maxCapacity - Variable in class common.dto.ParkDTO

schedulerButtons - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Stores the scheduler buttons value used by this component.
SchedulerConfig - Class in server.scheduler
Timed-job thresholds, read once from the .env file (via DotEnv) with sensible production defaults baked in.
SchedulerConfig() - Constructor for class server.scheduler.SchedulerConfig
Creates a new scheduler config instance.
SchedulerJob - Interface in server.scheduler
One timed maintenance task driven by SchedulerService.
SchedulerService - Class in server.scheduler
Runs the registered SchedulerJobs on a shared ScheduledExecutorService, polling every SchedulerConfig.getPollSeconds() seconds.
SchedulerService(Consumer<String>) - Constructor for class server.scheduler.SchedulerService
Builds the service and registers the jobs this session ships.

SELECT_WITH_PARK - Static variable in class server.dao.ParameterChangeDAO

send(ClientRequest) - Method in class client.service.NetworkService
Send a request using the active Session connection, asynchronously.
send(Long, Integer, String, String) - Method in class server.control.NotificationService
Persists, delivers, and broadcasts one notification.
sendEvent(ServerEvent) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Pushes an unsolicited event from the server to this subscribed client.
sendRequest(ClientRequest) - Method in class client.net.ClientConnection
Sends a request and blocks the caller's thread until the matching response arrives, the request times out, or the connection drops.
sendResponse(ServerResponse) - Method in class server.net.ClientSession
Sends a reply to a client request, serializing access to the output stream so it never interleaves with a concurrent ClientSession.sendEvent(common.dto.ServerEvent).
sentAt - Variable in class common.dto.NotificationDTO
Delivery timestamp (string form), or null if not yet delivered.

server - Variable in class server.boundary.ServerGUI
Stores the server value used by this component.
server.app - package server.app
Server-side application entry points.
server.boundary - package server.boundary
Server graphical boundary classes used to configure and operate the server.
server.control - package server.control
Server controllers that implement the GoNature business use cases.
server.dao - package server.dao
Data-access objects that persist and load GoNature data from the relational database.
server.db - package server.db
Database connection and environment-loading utilities.
server.net - package server.net
Server TCP/IP networking, routing and client-session management.
server.scheduler - package server.scheduler
Background jobs that enforce reminder, timeout, no-show and waitlist rules.
server.subscription - package server.subscription
Server-side publish/subscribe registry for realtime client updates.
ServerEvent - Class in common.dto
A change notification pushed from the server to subscribed clients.
ServerEvent(String, long, EventOp, Serializable) - Constructor for class common.dto.ServerEvent
Creates an event stamped with the current wall-clock time.
ServerGUI - Class in server.boundary
JavaFX GUI for managing the GoNature server.

ServerGUI.ClientRow - Class in server.boundary
Represents a connected client entry displayed in the table.
ServerListener - Interface in server.net
Contract for server listener behavior in the GoNature application.
ServerResponse - Class in common.dto
Represents a response sent from the server to the client.

Creates a response without additional data.

Creates a response with additional data.

Performs the show alert operation.
showCasualTicket(VisitDTO) - Method in class client.view.GateController
Renders the server-priced confirmation for a casual walk-in, leading with the ticket number (the visit id) for the employee to note — it is the only handle for exiting an anonymous walk-in later, under Exit · Casual.
showConfirmation(ReservationDTO) - Method in class client.view.ReservationCreateController
Renders the payment confirmation for a freshly booked reservation from the server's ReservationDTO: reservation number, the server-computed total (price in cents formatted as shekels), and whether it was paid in advance or is due on arrival.
showDetail(ReservationDTO) - Method in class client.view.ReservationListController
Opens a small read-only detail of one reservation: every field the row hints at, spelled out — date, time, party, type, status, price, payment, guide and confirmation code.

Shows the Entry-mode cards and hides the Exit-mode cards (or vice versa).
